title: NoeticaProvenance
description: CONSUMED STUB — provenance is a Noetica mechanism (Law 18); MP populates its shape as content and does NOT implement a provenance engine (Law 6). The RM1 provenance shape lives in common.schema.json#/$defs/Provenance (package §1.3, §4.4); this stub aliases it to record Noetica ownership until the real Noetica contract publishes.
